items.docs: POSTs a JSON body with a required `type` discriminator. Supported types include `clearinghouseState`, `batchClearinghouseState`, `spotClearinghouseState`, `batchSpotClearinghouseState`, `metaAndAssetCtxs`, `spotMetaAndAssetCtxs`, `frontendOpenOrders`, `userFills`, `userFillsByTime`, `userFunding`, `userNonFundingLedgerUpdates`, `userTwapSliceFills`, `userVaultEquities`, `delegatorHistory`, `delegatorRewards`, `delegatorSummary`, `subAccounts`, and `outcomeMeta`.
